See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 43650 => 'tele.ring', 43660 => 'Hutchison Drei Austria', 43664 => 'A1 TA', 43670 => 'spusu', 43676 => 'T-Mobile AT', 436770 => 'T-Mobile AT', 436771 => 'T-Mobile AT', 436772 => 'T-Mobile AT', 436778 => 'T-Mobile AT', 436779 => 'T-Mobile AT', 4368181 => 'A1 TA', 4368182 => 'A1 TA', 4368183 => 'Orange AT', 4368184 => 'A1 TA', 43688 => 'Orange AT', 43699 => 'Orange AT', ];
